commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Zed usage provider with Keychain and optional dashboard-cookie billing, documentation/tests, widget/provider registry updates, and a split-mode status-item placement repair.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review defects: the diff directly shows broad Auto cookie import, release-owned CHANGELOG edits, and widget project metadata downgrades. No high-confidence runtime reproduction exists for the new Zed provider or split-mode placement because the PR body leaves those real checks unchecked.
